# `polars selector not` for [expression](/commands/categories/expression.md)

<div class='command-title'>Inverts selector.</div>

## Signature

```> polars selector not {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input           | output          |
| --------------- | --------------- |
| polars_selector | polars_selector |
## Examples

Inverts selector
```nu
> polars selector first | polars selector not

```
